name: Andrea's Coffee Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients for the cake together in a large bowl.
2. Beat the mixture for 3 minutes until smooth.
3. Grease a tube pan and pour half of the batter into it.
4. Sprinkle half of the filling mixture over the batter.
5. Pour the remaining batter on top and sprinkle with the rest of the filling topping.
6. Drizzle 3 tablespoons melted butter over the entire cake.
7. Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
